The ElevenLabs Voices API provides management capabilities for the voice library, including listing, retrieving, creating, editing, and deleting voices. Developers can access a library of over 5,000 pre-built voices and manage their own custom voices. The API also supports voice design, voice settings management, and voice library sharing.
